v 
 
BYAMBO BITANSHI 
Ntendekelo ya mfunjishilo ya katataka yaimena pa kwingijisha byaketekelwa kubiwa 
(competence-based curriculum) amo bafunda mobafwainwa kufunda kuuba ne kulenga bintu 
kwingijisha maana akatataka ne buyuke. Nanchi kwingijisha competence based (CBC) kwaleta 
lupimpu ne kuwamishako mfunjilo ya bafunda. Kipamo kitala pa lufunjisho kyayukishatu 
bulongo makatazho eya na mambo aluno lupimpu lwa mfujilo yakatataka. Onkao mambo, 
kipamo kitala pa kufunda kyanengezha ne kupana byakwingijisha pa kufunjisha pa kuuba amba 
kufunda kulumbulukenga bulongo. 
Ino ntendekelo ya mfunjishilo ya mu Kikaonde ya shikamana pa mizhilo ya buyuke (competence 
based) ayo itundaika kufunda pabyo tupitamo mu moba abumi bwetu. Nanchi byaketekelwa 
kubiwa nobe kumvwañana, ndangulukilo yazhika, maana akupwisha makatazho, kulanguluka na 
kusabaula, kwilangulukilako, kuyuka kwingijisha makopyunta ne intaneti ne busulu byo 
byaingijishiwa mu buuku wa Curriculum Framework. Kabiji ino mitwe-kache, yaketekelwa 
kubiwa bulongo mukweseka kukwasha kufikizha mfunjilo ya buyuke nangwa amba CBC. Abino 
byaimena pa kuteshako muchima ne kwimika bipimo byawama byaketekelwa kubiwa. Onkao 
mambo, naketekela namba kuno kufunda kwa kwingijisha CBC mu Kikaonde mu Fomu 1, kusa 
kukwashako kuwamisha, kwatanchikiwa mu mabuuku a mizhilo ya kyalo aavula nobe, mu bintu 
bikwasha ku lufunjisho kutwajijila (Education for sustainable development), kwa 2023 ne kwa 
Zambia Education Curriculum Framework kwesekana na lutangijilo lwa 2016,  alo lubena 
kwamba pa byakonsheka kufikizhiwa lufunjisho kubena Zambia. 
Kunungapotu, uno buuku ubena kumwesha kwibikishako kwa kipamo kitala pa kufunda mu 
kupeezhezhako bafunjishi mu mfujishilo, kupana lutangijilo kupichila mu mingilo yapanyiwa ne 
lweseko lwa bafunda alo lwaimena pa kuuba byaketekelwa bulongo. Bino nangwa byonkabyo, 
bafunjishi batundaikwa kufikizha ino mfunjishilo kupichila mu kupesapesa ne kwingijisha 
maana akusomba kabiji ne kubikilapo maana akwabo pa byobya byashalapo pa kimye kyo 
babena kufunjisha. 
Joel Kamoko (Mr) 
 
Permanent Secretary- Education Services 
Ministry of Education

vi 
 
LUSANCHILO 
Uno buuku wa Fomu 1 mu Kikaonde walupulwa na bukwasho bwa bangikazhi baji mu kipamo 
kitala pa kufunda kabiji ne babuula kwingila mukino kipamo. Nanchi bantu umo umo ne bipamo 
biimena bevwangilemo ne kubika milanguluko pamo pa byakwingijisha buyuke (Competence 
Based Curriculum). Onkao mambo, kipamo kitala pa lufunjisho kyapana lusanchilo ku bonsetu 
bevwangilemo mukupana milangwe yabo ayo yakwashishe mu kunemba uno buuku wa Fomu1. 
mu Kikaonde. 
Mukupeezhako nasanchila bonse bamingilo ba ku Curriculum Development Centre, abo 
baingijile na ngovu mukumona amba ma syllabi anembewa ne kupwishiwa bulongo. 
Charles K. Ndkala, (Dr) 
 
Director of Curriculum Development 
Ministry of Education

viii 
 
NTENDEKELO 
Uno buuku wa Fomu 1 mu Kikaonde wanengezhiwa mujishinda ja kukumya, mukukebesha 
kukwasha bafunjishi kufikizha mfunjishilo bulongo mu ino mfunjilo (Curriculum) ya katataka. 
Auno buuku wa lutangijilo wanengezhiwa kwesekana na buyuke bwa 2023 Competence Based 
Curriculum Syllabus. Uno buuku wanembewa mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi kukonsha 
kufunjisha nangwa kwa kubuula mabuuku. Kabiji mu uno buuku babikamo byakwingijisha, 
mingilo, lweseko lwa bafunda kwesekana na kipimo ne nkebelo ya bafunda. 
Kipamo kitala pa kufunda kyayukishatu bulongo makatazho ajipo pa lupimpu lwa kutendeka 
kufunda kwingijisha buyuke bwa (Curriculum wa Competence Baesd). Nkebelo ya kwingijisha 
Competence Based Curriculum yaleta lupimpu mukuwamishako mfunjishilo. Kabiji uno buuku 
wamwesha patooka kwipana kwa kipimo kitala pa lufunjisho mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi 
kukonsha kufunjisha bulongo, kupichila mu lutangijilo, mingilo yapanyiwa ne lweseko lwaimena 
pa biketekelo bya buyuke (Competence Based Curriculum). Nangwa byonkabyo, bafunjishi 
batundaikwa kupesapesa ne kusomba pa kuuba amba bapwishe lukatazho pa kimye kyo bena 
kufunjisha. 
Onkao mambo, mingilo ne lweseko lwapanyiwa mukweseka kutundaika kwingila ne kulangluka 
kwazhika mu bafunda kabiji ne kukwatankanya mfunjilo ya bintu byapusana-pusana pa sukuulu. 
Bafunjishi batundaikwa kufunjisha kwesekana na nkebelo ya bafunda, kupesapesa, kwingijisha 
mashinda aitabizhiwa umvwe bekimona amba kyakila mukuwama. 
Kuno kupeezhako kwa mu mfunjishilo kusa kukwashako bafunda kunonkelamo nangwa bafuma 
mubuzhokoloke bwapusana-pusana. 
Nanchi kyamwekana Patoka amba uno buuku usa kukwashako bafunjishi kufunjisha mu ino 
mfunjilo ya katataka ya kwingijisha buyuke (Competence Based) mu kutundaika bafunda na 
maana akuyuka ne kwikala na byubilo byawama mu mfunjilo. 
 
BYAKWINGJISHA UNO BUUKU 
Mingilo yanengezhiwa mu uno buuku yafwayinwa kufunjishiwa mu temu 1 mu Fomu1. Nanchi 
uno buuku bamwabanya mu bishina bibiji kabiji mu bino bishina muji bibese byapusana-pusana 
nobe, kwamba ne kuteleka, kutanga, byambo, nchikameno ne nembelo. Mu kunungapotu, uno 
buuku kechi ke lufunjisho ine. Mufunjishi watundaikwa kunengezha lufunjisho kufuma mu uno 
buuku saka akyangye kufunjisha. Monai amba mwatolamo mingilo mu bibese byapusana-pusana 
apa bino mwanemba lufunjisho lwa pajuuba-pajuuba. 
Kimwesho, lufunjisho lwafwainwa kwikala na kwamba ne kuteleka, byambo, kutanga ne 
kunemba. Pa kunengezha lufunjisho, monai amba mwasalamo bintu ne mingilo yo musa 
kufunjisha bafunda mu byaketekelwa kubiwa. Nanchi kimo kimye lufunjisho lwakosha kwikala 
na byaketekelwa kubiwa kukila pakimo. Onkao mambo, obewa pamo nobe mufunjishi 
wafwainwa kumona kibese kibena kukebewa kutaiwapo kimye kyabaya. Kabiji yuka amba 
mingilo yonse yapanyiwa mu byaketekelwa kubiwa kechi yafwainwa kufunjishiwatu mu 
lufunjisho lumo ne, bino yafwainwa kufunjishiwa mu mafunjsho aavula.

ix 
 
 
 
MASHINDA ASALWA KWINGIJISHA 
Kimye kyonse mufunjishi saka akyangye kufunjisha wafwainwa kumona mu syllabus wa 
fomu 1 ne kumona mashinda obapana akufunjishilamo Litilicha. Kabiji Mufunjishi 
watundaikwa kwingijisha mashinda apusana-pusana kwesekana na nkebelo ya bafunda.

1 
 
KISHINA 1: KWINGIJISHA BIZHIMA KUTAMA 
Bijimo: Mu kino kishina mufunjishi usa kufunjisha pa bibese bitanu kutendekela pa Kuteleka ne 
Kwamba, Kutanga, Kunemba, Mulakazhilo ne Ntuntulwilo. Kabiji bafunda basakuyuka butame 
bwa kwingijisha bizhima kutama, kwikala na kipizha kya kuuba kino kyubilo ne bintu byatama 
bifumamo ne byawama bifuma mu kulondela mikambizho ya kwingijisha bizhima bulongo. 
 Mufunjishi ayuke amba kino kishina kyaimena pa kibese kya Kuteleka ne Kwamba, kabiji 
mafunjisho ajimo avwangamo ne mingilo ya kuuba bafunda saka bakyangye kutendeka Kutanga 
ne Kunemba. 
Kongola/Kalobo: 
Juuba jimo mwanyike umo waimene kuya ku kusuulu Byo afikile mu sukulu wataine bakwabo 
balama tumabotolo twamwekelenga nobe twa Mojo mu maboko. Pakumona oa mabotolo 
wakomokele  ne kulomba bakwabo kumupapo. Bamubujile amba kechi basa kumupela apo ine, 
kana ku kibanza kwafyamika bulongo. Uno mwanyike waswile kabiji baile ku   kibanza ko 
bakamupejile. Byo bamupele kuswitamo, pa kupitapo ka kimye kacheche, wabazhimukiletu uji 
mu kipatela. Byo bamwipwizhe kulondolola kyalengejile, waambile amba watomene bizhima. 
Byambo Byanema 
n Bizhima 
n Kusulwisha 
n Kipizha 
n Twishi twakafukula 
n Maluwo 
 
KIBESE A: KUTELEKA NE KWAMBA 
Mutwe: Mwisambo 
Mutwe-kache: Bintu bitulamata 
Buyuke: Kwingijisha mulaka wafikilamo bulongo pa kwisamba pa bintu bitulamata (Kwingijisha 
bizhima kutama) 
Ntendekelo 
Mu kino kibese kya Kuteleka ne Kwamba. Bafunda basakuyuka butame ne buyuke bwa 
kwingijisha bizhima. 
n Ndonda ya lufunjisho 
Mufunjishi abuule bafunda kwisamba pa kwingijisha bizhima kutama. 
n Apane mitwe ya kwisambapo yaamba pa kwingijisha bizhima kutama. 
n Abike bafunda mu bipanyi pakuuba amba besambe. 
Biñambañamba

2 
 
n Kipabi kya kunembapo 
n Choko 
n Buuku wa lufunjisho 
n Bikaachi bya byambo 
 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Mufunjishi: 
Mufunjishi esambe na bafunda pa ano mashinda mwatamina kwingijisha bizhima. Ebabuule 
bafunda mwaila kyambo kya bizhima. 
n Bizhima ke muchi washinta wingijishiwa  kukila pa kipimo kyafwainwa. 
n Bizhima biji mu mashinda avula, biji nobe kupepa jamba, kubika jamba mu mema ne michi 
ikwabo ya mubipatela nobe amatani, dayasipamu, heloini ne bikwabotu. 
n Mufunjishi abike bafunda mu tubipanyi pa kuuba’mba besambe aino mitwe ya mepuzho 
yapanyiwa kunshi. 
n Banembeshi bapane sawakya panyuma ya kwisamba mikumbu ya mepuzho o bapewa. 
Mepuzho: 
1. Ñanyi bipamo bya Kafulumende bikanya kwingijisha bizhima kutama? 
2. Mashinda ka bantu lelo jino mo babena kwingijisha bizhima? 
3. Ñanyi buwame buji mu kwingijisha bizhima bulongo? 
4. Ñanyi butame bo wamona buji mu kwingijisha bizhima kutama? 
 
Bafunda: 
n Bafunda bafwainwa kuyuka kuuba amba Kafulumende wabika mabumba atala pa kukanya 
ñingijisho ya bizhima kutama, abino bipanyi ke ba DEC (DRUG INFORCEMET 
COMMISSION), ZP(ZAMBIA POLICE). 
n Bafunda bengile mingilo yo bapewa ku mufunjishi mu bipanyi. 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: 1. Bintu byo besamba pa kwingijisha bizhima  
 
 
 
 
 
 
  kutama  pano bebyambe ku bakwabo 
2. Besambe bulongo mutwe wasalwa pa  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
   kwingijisha bizhima kutama  
Mwingilo wakuuba 
Bafunda besambe pa bintu bitanu byo balanguluka amba byo byafwainwa kubiwa pa kukanya 
kwingijisha bizhima kutama mu nyaunda yabo. 
Mepuzho:

3 
 
Mufunjishi abuule bafunda kwamba byo bafunda pa kwingijisha bizhima kutama. Apa bino 
anungepo kwamba byo bafunda. 
KIBESE B: KUTANGA 
Mutwe 1: Mpeyo ya lufunjisho 
Mutwe-kache: Nsulo ya mabuuku aingijishiwa 
Buyuke: Bya kutana mabulañano mu mabuuku 
Ntendekelo 
Mu kino kibese kya Mpeyo ya Lufunjisho bafunda basakuyuka byakutana mabulañano mu 
mabuuku.  
n Mufunjishi alumbulule bulongo mwatala kyambo kya nteta ne tebulu wa byambo. 
n Abuule bafunda kuyuka bya kwingijisha nteta ne tebulu wa byambo. 
n Abuule bulongo bafunda bya kutana mabulañano kufuma mu mabuuku kwingijisha nteta ne 
tebulu wa byambo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba: Kutana mabulañano kufuma mu mabuuku apewa apusana-pusana 
Bafunda: 
n Bafunda bafwainwa kuyuka kuuba amba Nteta ya Byambo ke mutanchi wa mazhina, 
byambo, mitwe ne bintutu bikwabo byo banemba kunyuma ya buuku mu kukwasha ubena 
kupesapesa kutana mabulañano akebewa. 
n Bafunda bengile mingilo yo bapewa  mu bipanyi. 
n Batane bulongo mabuñano kwingijisha nteta ne tebulu wa byambo. 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa 
Kutana mabulañano bulongo kufuma mu mabuuku apewa 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Kwingijisha nteta ya byambo ne tebulu wa byambo kutana mabulañano mu mabuuku 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa 
Kwingijisha nteta ya byambo ne tebulu wa byambo bulongo kutana mabulañano mu mabuuku 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Bafunda bakebe mabulañano kupichila mu kwingijisha nteta ne tebulu wa byambo 
Mepuzho: 
Mufunjishi abuule bafunda kwamba bintu byo bafunda, apa bino ne aye mwine anungepo byo 
bashapo

4 
 
Mutwe 2: Byambo 
Mutwe-kache: Ndumbulwilo ya byambo 
Buyuke: Kwingijisha byambo byafikilamo bulongo 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Kwisamba pa ndumbulwilo ya byambo bimo byasalwa 
Mufunjishi: 
Mufunjishi amone kuuba amba wabula bafunda bya kwingijisha byambo byafikilamo 
n Apane kibaaba kufuma mu mabuuku mo basakutana byambo. 
n Ebabuule kulumbulula byambo bimo byasalwa kufuma mu kibaba. 
n Mufunjishi ebabuule bafunda kupana ndumbulwilo ya kulumbulula ku bakwabo. 
n Apane mwingilo ku bafunda wa kwingijisha byambo bimo byasalwa mu bipelu. 
Biñambañamba 
n Kipabi kya kunembapo 
n Choko 
n Buuku wa lufunjisho 
n Bikaachi bya byambo 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa 
Kwisamba bulongo pa ndumbulwilo ya byambo bimo byasalwa. 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Bafunda bapane mikumbu ya byambo byo balumbulula. 
Bafunda: 
Bafunda bamone kuuba amba balondela bino: 
n Balondele bulongo mabulañano akibaaba kufuma mu mabuuku mo basakutana byambo. 
n Balumbulule bulongo byambo bimo byasalwa kufuma mu kibaba. 
n Bafunda bapane ndumbulwilo ya kulumbulula ku bakwabo. 
n Bobe  mwingilo wa kwingijisha byambo bimo byasalwa mu bipelu. 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Bafunda bapane bulongo mikumbu ya byambo byo 
 
 
 
 
 
 
  balumbulula. 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Bafunda bengijishe byambo byasalwa mu bipelu  
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Bafunda bengejishe bulongo byambo byasalwa mu 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 bipelu.

5 
 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Bafunda balenge bipelu na byambo byafikilamo bulongo. 
Mepuzho: 
Bafunda bambepo bintu bimo byo bafunda mu luno lufunjisho. Apa bino ne aye mufunjishi 
anungepo pa byashalapo. 
 
Mutwe 3: Ntangilo Yazhika 
Mutwe-kache: Kutanga Nchikameno  
n Ndonda ya lufunjisho 
Bafunda batange bibaaba muji bya mu mabuuku byapusana-pusana.  
n Bibaba nabiji mashimikila, bishimi, nsansawilo, nsapawilo, yimbo ya kumuzhi ne bikwabotu. 
n Mufunjishi apane mepuzho ku bafunda. 
Buyuke: Bafunda batange ne kumvwisha bulongo bibaaba muji bya mu mabuuku byapusana-
pusana. 
Mingilo yakuuba: Kutaanga bibaaba. 
Kibaaba  
Makatazho onse atendekele panyuma ya myaka ibiji yapitapo,po natendekejile kwingijisha 
bizhima. Kwajinga ne mwanamukazhi umo wapwishishe myaka makumi abiji ne itanu mukaleya 
na mambo kwitwezha mu busulu bwa kusulwisha bizhima.  
Katataka papo, bamupimine ne kumutana amba uji na twishi twakafukula. Bena kwami nabo 
bepizhizhe na kisela kwingijisha bizhima kutama. Mu kimye kitanshi kyo twasambakene 
baingijishanga bizhima kutama bingi. Bino amiwa pa kyokya kimye kechi naingijishanga bizhima 
kutama ine, kabiji natwajijile na kwibatundaika kushinda uno muteeto pakuuba amba baleke 
kikupu. 
Naesekele kwisamba ne bena kwami pa uno mutwe wa kwingijisha bizhima kutama, kabiji ne 
bachinyishe kuuba amba, maluwo apwe. Pano, bino byonse kechi byasebezele ine. Mukumbu ku 
bino byonse ke wakuuba amba, kechi nakonsheshe kwibakwasha ine. Mu kuya kwa kimye, 
batendekele kwikala na bukaji. Ne kyafuminemo batendekele kumpuma pa juuba pa juuba. 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Bibaaba bitangiwe bulongo. 
Mingilo yakuuba: 
Bafunda bakumbule mepuzho apusana-pusana. 
Mepuzho: 
1. Busulu ka bwitwezhezhemo mwanamulume uji mu jishimikila?

6 
 
2. Mu milanguluko yobe, uno mutwe ubena kwamba pa ka? 
3. Ñanyi kintu kyalengejile mwanamukazhi umo kumutaya pa kazhima? 
4. Kintu ka kimo kyafumine mu kwingijisha bizhima kutama kwa mwanamukazhi umo? 
5. Kumvwa bakazhi amba “kechi nakonsheshe kwibakwasha ine.” Mwayila jishimikila, ino 
ñambilo yatala muka? 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Bafunda bakumbule bulongo mepuzho     apusana- 
 
 
 
 
 
 
  pusana. 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Bafunda bepipishe kibaba kyatangiwa 
Mufunjishi abuule bafunda  
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: 
Bafunda bepipishe bulongo kibaaba kyo batanga 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Kwisamba ndumbulwilo ya byambo 
Byambo: 
n Bizhima 
n Kusulwisha 
n Kipizha 
n Twishi twakafukula 
n Maluwo 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: 
Kwisamba bulongo ndumbulwilo ya byambo. 
Ndumbulwilo ya byambo yaketekelwa: 
n Bintu nabiji binyu, michi ya ku kipatela yashinta, nangwa michi ikwabo imo yakanyiwa. 
n Kupotesha 
n Muteeto 
n Tulongolo tucheche tubula kumweka twa mu mashi 
n Masongola 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
1. Mu ñanyi mashinda kwingijisha bizhima kutama mo kuletela makatazho? 
2. Mashinda ka owalanguluka akonsha kukwasha kushinjilamo kwingijisha bizhima kutama? 
3. Bañanyi bo walanguluka bengijisha bingi bizhima kutama mu kino kyalo kya Zambia?

7 
 
Mepuzho: 
Mufunjishi abuule bafunda kwambapo bintu bimo byo bafunda mu kwipipisha. Apa bino, ne aye 
asunsepo pabyo baamba. 
 
KIBESE C: KUNEMBA 
Mutwe: Nsombelo 
Mutwe-kache: Nembelo ya Nsombelo 
Ndonda ya lufunjisho: 
n Mufunjishi abuule bafunda kuuba amba babena kufunda pa nembelo ya nsombelo. 
n Ebabuule byafwainwa kunembwa nsombelo ne bintu byafwainwa kunembwamo. 
n Bafunda banembe bulongo nsombelo. 
Buyuke : Kunemba mutanchi wa bintu bikala mu nembelo ya nsombelo.  
Mwingilo wakuuba:  
Kwisamba nembelo ya nsombelo ne bintu byafwainwa kwibikiwamo. 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Kwisamba bulongo nembelo ya nsombelo ne bintu 
byafwainwa kwibikiwamo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba:  
Bafunda besambe ne kutongola bintu byafwainwa kwikala mu nembelo ya nsombelo (nobe mutwe, 
ntendekelo, bikomo biji mu byepelo ne Mepuzho.) 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Bafunda besambe ne kutongola bulongo bintu  
 
 
 
 
 
 
  byafwainwa kwikala mu nembelo ya nsombelo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
Bafunda banembepo nsombelo imo pa ino mitwe yapanyiwa 
1. Nemba nsombelo pa mo kyawamina ne kutamina kwingijisha bizhima kutama. 
2. Bantu bonse bafwainwa kwibaswisha kwingijisha bizhima kutama. Pachika. 
3. Nemba jishimikila pa muvyala obe umo ye bakashile na mambo a kwingijisha bizhima kutama. 
 
Mepuzho:  
Mufunjishi abuule Bafunda kwambapo bishinka bimo byo bafunda. Apa bino ne aye apitulukemo 
pacheche  byafunda Bafunda. 
KIBESE D: MULAKAZHILO

8 
 
Mutwe: Mitundu ya Byambo 
Mutwe-kache: Bibese bya ñambo 
n Ndonda ya lufunjisho 
Mufunjishi abuule bafunda bya kusobolola byambo mwayila mitundu yabo. 
n Ebatangijile mu kulumbulula mitundu ya byambo 
Buyuke: Kusobolola byambo mwayila mitundu ya byambo 
Mwingilo wakuuba (1)  
Kusobolola mitundu ya byambo (bintu, tusuñami, byubilo, ndumbululo, tulumbuluzhi, 
tununganunga, tutangijilo, ngitabulwilo) 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa:

Tanga kino kibaaba kyapewa kwesakana na byo bakukambizha. 
Mu kisemwatu, nsongwalume ne nsongwakazhi bakonsha kwifwalama bingi umvwe betemwa. 
Mwanamukazhi ne mwanamulume baji nobe bichi nangwa bijimwa bipanga bipangwa. 
Akilangulukai pa bichi byo bivula ne bipangwa byo bilengwa! Bashayuka bapeya bya kashinshi 
bamba amba, bipangwa bilengwa mu mashinda abiji. Jishinda jimo ke bulume bo babika mu bichi, 
nsono ne bijimwa ya kichi nangwa kijimwa kine bwa kwisemesha bunke nangwa kwivuzha (self 
pollination) ne jishinda ja bubiji ke kwisemesha kubiwa pakachi ka bichi byavula bya mutundu 
umo nangwa byapusanana (cross pollination).

14 
 
Kupanga kwa bipangwa bimo ku bichi byavula kubiwa panyuma ya kuuba makopyo a bichi 
(pollen) beafumya ku maluba beasenda ne kwiatwala ku maluba a kichi kikwabo kya mutundu 
umo nangwa kyapusanako pa kuuba amba bichi biyuuke masongola byonka byo kikala ku bantu 
pa kusambakana kwa kwilaala inge bakeba kusema mwana. Ne bichi ne bijimwa byo byuba 
byonkabyo pa kuuba amba bivule nangwa kupanga bipangwa byavula abyo byatemwa kuja bantu. 
Pano nga bichi byakonsha kusema byepi saka bibula kulaala pamo? 
Bilongolo, mwela, mema ne banyama bingila mwingilo wabaya mu kukwashako pa kuuba amba 
bichi nangwa bijimwa bivule. Pano bino mu uno mwisambo tusakwambakotu pa bilongolo, abyo 
biji mu mitundu yavula nobe nyuki, bipupulwa ne bikwabotu, mwane kuubala kukoka bisenda 
makopyo a bichi (pollen) kufuma ku kichi kimo kilume ne kutwala ku kikwabo kichi kikazhi ku 
maluba. Ano mashinda alondelapo o alondelwa pa kuuba amba bilongolo bikwasheko mu kusema 
ne kuvula kwa bichi. 
Patanshi, bilongolo biya na kwikala pa maluba a bichi. Bilongolo nabiji nyuki iya na kwikala 
pa maluba na mambo a kukeba mema atobala (nector) ekala mu maluba a bichi. Ano mema bamba 
amba awama bingi mambo atobala kabiji apana bingi ngovu mu mibiji ya bilongolo bi atoma.  
Kya bubiji, makopyo alamata ku mubiji wa bilongolo. Inge kya kuuba lunyuki ke luvilauke ne 
kwikala-ikala ku maluba, makopyo afuma ku bibese bya lusemo bya kijimwa kilume (anthers) ne 
kulamachila ku maulu nangwa lubaji lukwabo lwa mubiji. Kilengela kino kubiwa ke na mambo a 
kuuba amba makopyo bealenga mu jishinda ja kulamata ku mubiji wa kilongolo byonka bilamata 
kyela ku jibwe ja magineti. 
Kya busatu, bilongolo bisenda mema a tobala kufuma ku maluba. Bilongolo inge byaiya na 
kusenda mema atobala ku maluba, makopyo afuma ku kibese kya lusemo kya maluba alamata ku 
maulu a kilongolo, ponkapotu ke kuya ku jiluba jikwabo, kikale ku jiluba ja musampi ja kyonkakyo 
kichi nangwa ku ja kukichi kikwabo. Bilongolo byuba bino javula na mambo a kupitañana ne 
kwenda kukeba kajo. Bino bilongolo kechi byayukapo amba bisenda ne makopyo kukeatwala ku 
bichi bikwabo ne kuuba amba byo bilengela bipangwa kuvula ne bichi kusemununa ine. 
Kulondelapo, makopyo beatwala ku bijimwa nangwa bichi bikwabo. Bilongolo byo biya na 
kwikala pa maluba akwabo, makopyo aji kulamata ku maulu nangwa ku bibese bikwabo bya mibiji 
ya bilongolo aya na kubikwa nangwa kushimwinwa pa jiluba jikazhi (stigma). 
Mu kupezhako, makopyo a kijimwa asambakana na jike ja lusemo ja kijimwa kikazhi 
(fertilization). Inge makopyo a kijimwa ne jike ja lusemo ja kijimwa byaikala na mufundo wa 
lusemo pa kusambakana, ku kuuba amba bipangwa bikwabo byakonsha kulengwa nangwa bichi 
bikwabo bisemwa ne kuvula.  
Ano o mashinda mo muvujila bichi ne bijimwa pa kuuba amba bipangwa bikaleko byavula.

bapewa

(ntuntulwilo ya kyambo pa kyambo (literal translation), ya kupingizhapo byambo (substitution), 
ya kusenga (borrowing/loaning), ya kupikulula byambo bya yenka wo mulaka (transliteration), wa 
kulumbulula (description)  ne wa kukumpakanya generalization) 
Tuntulula bino byambo kufumya mu Kizungu kutwala mu Kikaonde. 
Once upon a time, in a village of Kasempa, there lived a little boy. His name was Kanyambale. 
Kanyambale was a happy and clever boy. He loved to play outside and explore the bush. 
One day, he found a beautiful flower. The flower was red and had a sweet smell. He loved the 
flower and decided to take it home. 
As he was walking, he met his friend, named Kalulu. Kalulu asked Kanyambale, “What is that 
beautiful flower you have?” Kanyambale said, “I found it in the bush. It is so pretty and smells so 
good!” 
Kalulu said, “I love flowers too! Can I see it?” Kanyambale showed Kalulu the flower, and they 
both admired its beauty. 
Mukumbu waketekelwa: 
Kwajinga pa muzhi umo mu Kasempa, paikalanga kalombwana. Jizhina janji wajinga 
Kanyambale. Kanyambale wajinga mwanyike walusekelo kabiji wajimukile bingi. Watemenwe 
kukayila pangye ne kuya na kufwakasha mu jisaka. 
Juuba jimo, Kanyambale wataine jiluba jawama bingi. Jino jiluba jajinga jichila kabiji 
janukijilenga bulongo.Kanyambale watemenwe bingi jino jiluba kabiji wakebelenga kwijitwala ku 
nzubo yabo. 
Byo ayilenga ku nzubo wasambakene mulunda nanji wa jizhina ja Kalulu. Kalulu washikishe 
Kanyambale amba, “Nga jo jiluba jo wasenda mu maboko jafuma pi? Kanyambale wakumbwile 
amba, “Najikwijitana mu jisaka. Jawama bingi kabiji jinukila bingi bulongo!” 
Kalulu waambile amba, “Ne amiwatu ne atemwa bingi maluba! Tumone ne jimone byo jiji?” 
Kanyambale wamweshe Kalulu jiluba, kabiji bonse baumvwine bingi bulongo pa kumona buya 
bwajo. 
Bipimo bya ñingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Baana bengijishe bulongo mashinda apusanapusana 
kutuntulwilamo kibaaba kufumya mu Kizungu kutwala mu Kikaonde kabiji ne kufumya mu 
Kikaonde kutwala mu Kizungu. 
Ntuntulula bino byambo kufuma mu Kikaonde kutwala mu Kizungu. 
Byo bapwishe kutalatala jiluba Kanyambale ne Kalulu batatwileko kubwela ku nzubo. Mu jishinda 
Kanyambale waletelepo mulanguluko. Waambile amba, “Tukabyale jino jiluba mu galadeni wami

jino jiluba. 
Juuba jalondejilepo, Kanyambale ne Kalulu bakapempwile. Bafikele pepi na jino jiluba kabiji 
bakuminye bingi pa kutana kuuba amba jatendeka kusapuka. Basangalele bingi kabiji pa kumona 
jiluba jatendeka kukoma jikwabo. 
Mukumbu waketekelwa: 
When they finished admiring the flower, Kanyambale and Kalulu started going home. Then 
Kanyambale had an idea. He said, “Let’s plant the flower in my garden so it can grow and bloom 
again!” Squeaky agreed, and they planted the flower together. 
The next day, Kanyambale and Kalulu went to visit the flower. To their surprise, it had already 
started to grow! They were so happy and excited to see the flower blooming again.

Kiikaonde

Juuba jimo navulukile kuya na kufwakesha bamaama ku Kasempa. Nakanjijile sakya pa kitesheni. 
Myaka yapitapo yavula navulukile myaka yakala yo twajanga ntamba, bampuku, ne bankala, ne 
kuya mukwasa tuñonyi. 
Byo nafikile pa kitesheni kya Solwezi, nakankamenetu pa kumona banyike ba bacheche, 
babakazhi ne babalume, bavwala tupimpikinya twatabuka, kabiji twafitatu nobe maloba a mu 
kanyika. Kwitutala bibye, uba nobe twafuminetu munda ya bainato kufika ne lelo kwa kubula 
kowapo ine. Pa kumona byobya, milanguluko yatatwile kunkatazha bingi. 
Naikele kimye kyabaya saka ndangulukapotu. Natatwile kwi ipuzha amiwa mwine namba, “Kika 
kibena kulengela Bafunda babacheche kutanyiwa pa bitesheni kabiji ne kulaala pa bitesheni?” Abe 
Bafunda nkito yabo ke yakwiba, kulomba ne kutambula kajo ne mali mulunkana-nkana. Kabiji 
byubilo bikwabo, batemwa kutukana matuka abaya bingi. Fwanka naye, yenka wajimanga 
mangimela ye batela amba jamba nangwa amba kizhima.

kebata maana ku Bafunda ine. Javula bamo bansemi bayatu mukutoma maalwa, kwa kubula 
kukebela Bafunda maali a sukulu ine. Bimye bimo, natemenwe bingi kusuulu Pano inge nabuula 
bansemi bami namba, “bampanga ku sukulu na mambo a kubula kupana maali,” bambulanga amba 
“abyo byakuyuka obe mwine.’’ 
Mukwabo naye waambile amba, “Kikwabo atweba bamo, bansemi yetu babalume betushile bunke 
na bansemi babakazhi. Baaya ne na kusongola kungi. Kabiji bamo nabo bebasunga kuuba ba mu 
kamwisho yabo bashinta bingi. Lusongwela lwa bansemi yetu babakazhi nalo lwitulengele 
kunyema pa mazubo. Kabiji bamo banyike nabo bomvwatu bulongo kulondela bakwabo pa 
bitesheni.” 
Kafumulende wafwainwa kumona kuuba amba nsemi yense, wata maana ku Bafunda. Bansemi

Ngipipishio mu kibaaba 
Bansongwakazhi ne bansongwalume batanwa pa biteshenyi, nkito yabo ke kwiba ne kulomba, 
kabiji batambula kajo ne mali mu lunkana-nkana. Batemwa kutukana ne kupepa fwanka wa 
bizhima. Kabiji kilengela bano Bafunda kuya mu biteshenyi ke namambo a kuuba amba, bansemi 
babo kechi bebata maana ine. Bamo bansemi, bayatu mu kutoma maalwa, kabiji ne kusha Bafunda 
na bansemi babakazhi bunke. Kikwabo nakyo ke kusungwa na bamuka mwisho yabo bashinta. 
Lusongwela lwa Bafunda babakazhi kyo kimo kabiji ne Bafunda nabo kutemwatu kulondela 
bakwabo.

BISHO NE LWITABILO 
Ba Kaonde baji na lwitabilo lwa bintu bimo byo baitabilamo. Ba Kaonde baitabile amba 
kuntendekelo kwine, mwanamukazhi bamuzhijikile kuja make ne tufumbe (bampuku banuna). 
baitabile kuuba amba, inge mwanamukazhi waja kano kajo, ushinka lusemo. 
Kununga pa bino,mwanamulume naye, bamukanyanga kuja kalembula, bobwa bwa bandelema, 
mulembwe ne milombe. Baubanga kino, kuchi amba pa kukoma bwanabulume bwanji 
bwakakoka ne kukankalwa kusemesha. 
Kajo kapasha nobe makoko, bilobo, bilalabwa, pamotu ne bibinda kechi bekajanga ine. Baitabile 
amba azukumisha mu manungo. Kano kajingatu kajo kakuja Bafunda bacheche ne tukuta-
mfungo. 
Inetu wafwisha lukeke, bamupapikanga muzhazhi wafuma pakilende po bazhika kano kaana. 
Baubanga kino pakuuba amba ina mwana akaseme jikwabo. 
Inetu inge wasafwangizha, kafunga bekazhikanga kwafyamika kumakyamakya nangwa kimye 
kya muntu-wa muntu-wa. Nsemi ya uno mwana kechi bamuswishanga kujiila pamo na bakwabo 
ine poso bamovwa mu muchi pakupitapo ñondo umo. Bivwalo byo afwishishamo, kechi 
wibivulanga ne, kufikatu ne pa kimye kyo bakamovwa mu muchi.  
Kisho kikwabo kya ba Kaonde ke misango ya lwimu. Mwanamulume pakwimuna bako, ukinka 
jinungo jimo panshi. Bainetu, kibafwainwa ku kinka manungo onse panshi pakwimuna bako 
nangwa bamfumu. Bashetu bakinka manungo onse abiji panshi inge babena kwimuna mfumu 
nangwa kitumba-mfumu. 
Inge mwanamukazhi waya kumwenzhi, kizhila kuteekela kajo bantu. Bachinanga kuuba bino 
mambo a misongo ya kuchimuna bantu mukyaji. 
Inetu inge wanema pamuchima, mwata wanji kechi wafwainwa kulaala na Bafundabakazhi 
bakwabo ine. Inge wasulwa malwa mujino jishinda, mwanamukazhi wikala na nkila.  
Abino, ne bikwabotu byabula kunembwa, byo bisho ne lwitabilo luji, nangwa lwajinga na 
bakaonde kala ne mu ano moba.

amba nsongwakazhi uji na mabele antutu nangwa apitailako pantutu, kabiji uji peepi na kuya ku

Uno kisungu, bamupaatula ne kumubika mulumbusa nangwa amba muluonde. Kano ke

ina kisungu amba kisungu wapya.

Mazhika-kanwa 
Tanga jishimikila ne kukumbula mepuzho alondelapo. 
Mu kyalo ne kyalo muji bantu bapusana-pusana. Bamo bepi bakwabo balepa, bafita ne batoka, 
bafunda ne babula kufunda. Bano bonse bekala mu mapunzha alekana-lekana ne kwingila 
mingilo ya pusana-pusana. Monka mwayila bino ne mingilo yo bengila yaenda kupusana, 
bakwabo bengila mingilo ya kufola mali kukafulumende, bakwabo booba busulu, bakwabo nabo 
batambula mali alunkana-nkana ku bantu bakwabo ne kuuba mazhika-kanwa. 
Mazhika-kanwa kejishinda ja kupa muntu mali nangwa bintu pakuuba amba akufye ku mambo 
nangwa aswe kuuba kyo ukeba. Kabiji ano mazhika kanwa alengela bamo bantu kushukilwamo 
ne bakwabo kushaminwamo. 
  Bantu boba mazhika kanwa kechi beobatu ine/ Kuji ne bintu bilengela, kimo kilengela ke 
buyanji. Buyanji ne mazhika kanwa byendela pamo. Kabiji mazhika kanwa yo nsulo ya buyanji 
mu kyalo ne mu mapunzha avula. Mazhika-kanwa ayikala ke mukika wa kupwisha buyanji, ne 
buyanji naabo byonkabyo. 
  Kya mweshiwa patoka kuuba amba, bantu bayanji bapelelwa mu mashuko a bukwasho bwa 
mu byo bakajilwa mu bwikalo bwabo. Kipelako ke kwitumpa mu mazhika-kanwa. Bantu bayanji 
bafwa mukakose ka buyanji kabiji bamona amba, kyakonsha kwibakwashatu ke kukakachila ku 
mazhika-kanwa ne kupana byabula kuswishiwa pakuuba amba bamone byafwainwa mu bwikalo 
bwabo bwa pajuuba-pajuuba. 
Na mambo abuyanji, byalo byonse bikikoma byo biji peulu mu byubilo byamazhika-kanwa. 
Bino abya byalo byakoma mu bumamya, biji peulu mu byubilo bya bukishinka.  
Mazhika-kanwa  javujisha atanyiwa  ne kubiwa pakachi ka bantu babiji nangwa bipanyi bibiji, 
byalo bibiji, mu kafulumende ne mu maofeshi akatampe. Bantu bakwabo betumpa mu mazhika-

71 
 
kanwa pakuuba amba batambule kyo babena kusaka bukiji. Bimwesho ne misango ya mazhika-
kanwa ke bino: 
 Pa kutwela nkito; inge muntu waikala myaka yavula kwakubula kutwela nkito, wesekesha 
mashinda onse mwakongwela yewa ubena kutwezha nkito ne kumupa mali nangwa bintu 
bikwabo. Kabiji aba bobapa mwingilo wa kutwezha bantu makito naabo bakambizha boba 
bakeba nkito kwiba mali nangwa bintu bikwabo.  
Kikwabo, mazhika-kanwa obiwa inge muntu uji na mambo akatampe mu kije kya mambo. 
Pakuuba amba abuule kufwa nao, ke kupana mazhika- kanwa  ku banzhachishi ne oa mambo 
azhimañana. 
 Ba mu bipanyi bya bumulwila ntanda naabo boba mazhika-kanwa pakuuba amba bongole 
michima ya bantu bavula bebavotele. Kechi kyonkakyotu ine bengijisha ne mali a kyalo mu 
mashinda abula kufwainwa. Abino byonse ne byabula kutongolwa kala byalengela byalo ne 
mapunzha avula kubula bukomo ne bumamya bwalondoloka mambo buyanji bubena kuyilakotu 
palutwe. 
  Na mambo a kusaka kulekesha uno musongo wa mazhika-kanwa, kafulumende  wabikako 
kabungwe katala pa kukankanya  kino kisonso ko batela amba, Anti-Kolapush lwa kusopa 
ñingijilo ya bantu mu kyalo kabiji aba batanyiwa na kisonso kya mazhika-kanwa bakwaoni 
Komishoni. Kano kabungwe ko kapewa luusa lwa kwibatotolwesha. Inge bafwa nao bebataya 
pakazhima, ne kwibangata bipe byo banonkele mu byubilo bya mazhika-kanwa.

Kimwesho kya mitundu ya makalata 
Makalata aji mu mitundu  yapusana-pusana. Ano makalata anembewa mu mashinda  apusana-
pusana kuila monka mu mambo ene oa nembewa. Muntu wakonsha kunembela kolojanji, 
mulunda, mulongo nangwa mbayanji nkalata. Kimo kimye wakonsha kunemba makalata 
kubikamo bya kafulumende, nangwa ku kampanyi. Ano makalata kechi akonsha kwipasha ine.  
Nkalata ya ku makampanyi nangwa ku bantu bowabula kuyuka nangwa kwipwiluluka nabo 
iteelwa amba nkalata ndonda-mizhilo aya iya ku balunda netu itelwa amba  nkalata mbula-
mizhilo. Onse makalata aji na mizhilo. Bino amo aji na ndonda yo babula kuvulañanya.

munshi yo keyala ko ibeena kuya. Bikwabo bintu bitanyiwa nkalata ndonda-mizhilo  
ke 
bino:

n Kushala kanya ku kipiko kya kipeepala.

Makalata andonda-mizhilo mu kikaonde, atendeka na “Kwiba.” Panyuma ya keyala ko ibena 
kuya, palondela mwanzo wa byambo; “Mushingi mwane.” 
n Mutwe wa nkalata unembewa munshi ya lwimu lwa mushingi mwane na ku kilojo.

MPITO YA KWA ADAMSON MUSHALA 
 Ba Adamson Mushala basemekelwe pa muzhi wa Kasambano mu 1935. Uno muzhi waikajile 
kwipi na  Matushi Pulaimale Kusuulu Bashabo bajinga bena muzhi ba Kasambano Mushala ne 
bainabo bajinga ba Masheka Lutoba.  
Munda mwabo bebasemene jikumi; Kibambabwevu, Mutamba Kyalo, Kananda, Samson, Joseph, 
Patrick ne Friday. Kabiji banyenga yabo keba Mangaliya, Katoko ne Mutena. 
Ba Mushala batendekele sukulu wabo pa Kizela sukulu mu nkambi ya Mufumbwe mu 1948 sa 
baji na myaka ya kusamwa 12. Bapwishile sabu A ne B, kitandala  1ne 2 ponka pa Kizela Kusuulu 
Ba Adamson Mushala baji bingi na maana mu kusuulu Nanchi bapashile bunketu kuya ku 
Mukinge Mishonyi sukulu mu 1953 na kukafujilako kitandala 3 ne 4. Pa Mukinge paji musinso 
wa mafolonga bitota bisatu. Po paendanga ba Mushala panshi kukanamina kusuulu  
Mu 1956, bapashile kuya ku sukulu waba katanda wa  Mutanda River School. Uno naye waji wa 
Mishonyi . Popo bakafunjijile kitandala 5, Kitandala 6 wa panshi ne wa peulu.  
Nangwa bakwabo bapwishishenga masambijilo apeulu obafikilepo, abo batwelelenga makito 
akuuba nobe bufunjishi ne bukalaliki mu kafulumende. Ba Adamson Mushala bafunjile nkito ya 
bushilikale. Kyajishamo, kafulumende wajiko muyoyo myaka, wibapele mwingilo ye babujile 
kukomoka  wabu gemu kachi, nkito yamungye. 
Palutwe, baikelepo nepa nkito ya munembeshi wa kibiji watajilenga pa lufundo mu kino kyalo 
kyonse ku ‘freedom house’. Nangwa byonkabo, kibalajile ku muchima bingi, ke kifulo kya bu 
kulumpe bwa kipamo kitala pa banyama ne bilengwa na Lesa. 
Bebayukile ba Mushala saka ba kyangye kusatuka, bebashimuna amba, muntu wa wamine bingi 
muchima kabiji wa lusa ne kulangulukila bakwabo. Bano kechi bayukilepo kuzunzubika muntu 
wibakongwela amba “Leta maali ami ine.”

Mpaji ke masongola a kusongola bana bakazhi babiji nangwa bavula kabiji kyaikala kisho kya 
ku lunyuma mu bu Kaonde ne mitundu ikwabo mwaya Zambia. 
Mpaji yanemene bingi ku bashakulu mambo yanunganga munema (mushingi) ku bifulo nangwa 
bwikalo bwabo. Kyaji kiyukilo kya buukulumpe ne butangi bwa kisemwa biji bena muzhi, 
bitumba mfumu  ne mafumu.Okao mambo kechi kyasekele ku taana nsongwalume wapajika ine. 
Bakwabo bapajikanga ke bañanga ba lubuko ne bibinda bikatampe. Mino bamo bantu ba amba 
mpaji yawama kubula kubujijilwa bya kuja, mambo umo wamukazhi umvwe wabula kajo 
mukwabo uji naako ukonsha kunengezha. 
Bapajika bamba amba, bana bakazhi babiji kechi  bakoka na mingilo ya mukachi ne pangye ya 
nzubo ine, mambo mingilo ikala ya kutembakena. Batwajijila amba, mwana mulume wa mpaji 
kechi uyanda ine mambo umvwe  mukazhi umo wafumapo, wakolwa nangwa wafwa, mukwabo 
washalapo utwawajijila na kwingijila mwata wanji. Banungapo amba mwana mulume wa mpaji 
wakosha kusema bana bavula kukila ujina mwanamukazhi umo mambo kechi upembelela amba 
mwana akikome ine.  
 
Byakuuba bafunda 
Pano nembapo mitwe itanu(5) kufuma mu jishimikila ilengela bantu kusongola mpaji.

Byakuuba mufunjishi 
Mufunjishi apaane ndumbulwilo ya byambo, apa bino abuule bafunda kwingijisha bino byambo 
mubipelu. 
1. Bupite  
2. Bumbanzhi  
3. Lubesha  
Mikumbu ya ketekelwa 
1.  Bupite: Ke byubilo byatama bya kulaala-laala na Bafundabalume. 
Kipelu: Mitelo waalukatu ke pite ano moba. (Swai ne mikumbu ikwabo yaoloka) 
2. Bumbanzhi: Ke muchima wakwipayañana kwa kubula lusa. 
Kipelu: Mbazhi wiba. Konuna ne kwipayañana. 
3. Lubesha:Ke mwela upupa, wa mvula nangwa wa kubula mvula. 
   Kipelu: Lubesha upupa na mvula, onauna kajo ne kuleta kipowe.  
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: ndumbulwilo ya byambo isambiwa mwafwainwa. 
Mwingilo 2 
Kupaana ndumbulwilo ya byambo ne kwibingisha mu bipelu. 
 
Byakuuba mufunjishi 
Mufunjishi usa kupaana ndumbulwilo ya byambo ne kwingijishapo kimo mu kipelu nobe bino: 
Lunkunzha:ke kikola kishila kupichila mukusambakana kwa umo wabela kwakubula bukikizhi. 
Kipelu: Bantu bavula batambula kikola kya lunkunzha kupichila mubyubilo bya bupite  
 
na mambo abuyanji. 
Byakuuba bafunda: 
Bafunda balumbulule bino byambo ne kwibingijisha mu kulenga bipelu kwesakana nabyo 
besambapo. 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketela kubiwa: Ndumbwilo ya byambo yaingijishiwa bulongo 
mubipelu. 
 
Mepuzho 
Mu kino kibaaba twisamba pa byambo ne ndumbulwilo yabyo. Apa bino ne kulenga bipelu 
kwingijisha byambo bisambiwapo.

Mukino kibaaba, tusakwikala na ntangilo yazhikako. Ayo isa kusakiwa kuchikamenamo

Ndonda ya lufunjisho: 
n Mufunjishi atange kyepelo na manono, kasa alondela tuchibawilo bulongo. 
n Abuule bafunda kutanga bibaaba mu mabuuku abo akutangamo na manono. 
n Bomvwishe bulongo bwanembwamo 
n Abuule bafunda kukumbula mepuzho alondelapo. 
n Mufunjishi ne bafunda besambe pa mikumbu.

Mufunjishi atange byapelo bibiji na jiwi ja peulu ne kwipuzhapo mepuzho panyuma ya kutanga.

Mwingilo 1: Kutanga kibaaba 
Byukuuba mufunjishi 
n Mufunjishi abuule bafunda kutoola kibaaba paji jjishimikila ja Lupimpu Lwa Lubesha.

Byakuuba bafunda 
Bafunda batange byepelo byashalako ne kukumbula mepuzho alondelapo. 
 
LUPIMPU LWA LUBESHA 
Lupimpu lwa lubesha, ke kupimpulwa kwa nkilo mu kimye kyalepa. Lupimpu lwa lubesha ke 
kintu kimo pa byobya bintu bitulamata. Abino ke bintu bituzhokoloka ne makatazho otupitamo

101 
 
aji nobe nzala, mazhika kanwa, kukepa makito nangwa kubula makito.Kutema bichi byavula, 
kukowesha mwela ne mema, kutwa kyuya, mwela wa mvula wa kinkukwila, miyulo, kutama 
kwabumanya bwa kyaalo, twishi twakafukula ne lunkunzha, ne bikwabotu. 
Mapunzha apakachi ka kyalo ne jiulu, kutwa kyuya, kwimita ne kusema bana kwa banyike 
babakazhi ne bikwaabo bintu,byo byavulamo. 
Kupimpula kwa lubesha kwaiya na maaambo akutema bichi byavula mu mapunzha motwikala. 
Bichi bipana mwela wa kupema bantu, kimfutele, kufumyako mapulanga ,kukwata lubesha mu 
kimye kibeena kunoka mvula mukatampe. 
Kikwabo kileta lupimpu lwa lubesha, ke kusoka biswaswa. Kusoka biswaswa kwatama mambo 
kuleta lukatazho kubilengwa Lesa.  
 Kutema bichi, kulengela mwela wa nzubo ya mazhamatamba awa uvweta pa kyalo, mukifulo 
kya kuubaka mwela wakaba, kukaknkalwakuuba bino. Kino kilengela kukaba kwa kyandanshi. 
Bwishi bufuma mu minkinyi nabo, buleta bikola bya mumwela ne mumeema abyo bileengela 
lupimpu lwa lubesha. Kikwabo ke mapunzha kobataya biswaswa ne ndochi. Mapunzha 
abyonkabyo, alupula mwela wapusana-pusana awo ulengela lupimpu lwa nkilo. Bilengwa-lesa 
biji nobe miyulo ne mvula ya kinkukwila, bileta lupimpu lwa nkilo. 
Namambotu alupimpimpu lwa lubesha, ko biji bintu bifumamo bji nobe kyashi, banyama 
bamungye kufwa, bijimwa byuma, meema akepa mumikola ne tuluunga twa meema.  
Kutema bichi kulengela mwela yetupema kukepa ne ku sendwa kwa mushiji wapeulu kumvula  
nangwa amba (soilo ilozhini). Mukyalo inge mwaikala buyanji ne nzala, kilengela bantu kutwela 
mu byubilo byatama biji nobe bwivi, kwipayañana ne bupite ku banabakazhi. Banabakazhi nabo 
bayanda umvwe baleka masukulu ne kutwela mukwekele wa kwimita ne kusema Bafunda saka 
bakiji bacheche. 
Mu kwikala mu kisonso kya bupite, kulengela bamo kubela kikola kyatwishi twakafukula ne 
lunkunzha abyo bileta lukatazho kubebasunga, mambo bamo baleka mingilo ne kulama bakolwa, 
bakwabo nabo baleka mingilo mambo akukolwa. Onko mambo, bisemi byabo biyanjilamo.

102 
 
Kikwabo, kifuma mu lupimpu lwa lubesha ke mazhika kanwa. Mazhika kanwa ke kupwisha 
lukatazho luji na muntu mu mashinda atama ne mpelo ya bino yakonsha kutwala muntu 
pakazhima inge wazha na nsenzhi mukwapa. 
Kupimpula kwa lubesha, kuleta miyulu mumikola ne mutulunga twa mema. Ku byalo bimo, 
mvula ubeena kuleta bono bwa  kukundaula mazubo ne bishimikwatu bikwabotu, byabu apa bino 
ne konauna kajo. Abino ke bintu bimo bitulamata nangwa bituzhokoloka  ne makatazho 
afuminamo.

BIYA MU MESO BE BITEKENYA 
“Olo! Mingisa, wakikalatu kwakubula kwisunsumya. Abe Bafunda ba mumukwakwa basa 
kuja ka?” Bainanji ba Mangilita babijikile na jiwi ja peulu bingi. 
Mingisa wazhindaminetu nzoo. Mwanawamukazhi wakankalwa ne kyaso. Watala mwiulu; 
mute yenka wasokelenga meso anji na mambo akyashi. 
Bukijibiji, walangulukile ku kunkulukila lubilo ku mpoka yanji na mulanguluko 
wakukulako tupanza nangwa tubishi. Kya bulanda, mu kimpelampelatu, bishu bya myungu bya 
mwekelengatu nobe fwanka wauma . “Huu!” wapumatu mulupi, waaluluka kabwele. 
Mingisa waluba bya kutwa,ke kuyatu ku matalaki abena Tanzania. Nobe kukopa kwa jiso, 
ale! Jikalala mwina Tanzania wa mupyamo. Bukiji bukiji, wa mubombwela mu kibamba kyanji 
kyabwenyi mu kupwisha nzala yaku maulu.  
Byo apwishishe lusako lwanji, uno Mwalimu Muze, wa ku Tanzania, washinkwile jikwachi 
janji mwayula mali. Mingisa kutalako bibye, amba, “Kine Lesa upa wimazhala.” waambile bino 
byambo mu muchima. 
Mwalimu Muze, washikula K10 000 wamutambika ne kwamba amba, “Nakupa ano mali 
akwipotelamo obe mwine mbokoshi ya kukuzhikilamo.” Wakikankukatu. Mwalimu Muze 
watwajijila kwamba amba, “Amiwa webo, nabeela  kikola kyamuya nabo ne kaswende pamo. 
Nanchi, lufu lobe kechi luji palepeshane. Shalapo naya kwetu ne amiwa bakanzhike kuubalongo

107 
 
bami.”Mingisa wimaka panshi, wikatemamo ne kajibingo kakujila Bafunda banji boepainepo 
mubiji wanji ku lufu na mambo a kyashi kya onawine kajo kanji. 
“Bamaama kutama muchima, Kine bandetelela!” 
  
Mepuzho 
Mu uno mutwe, twisamba pa kutanga na jiwi ja peulu na manono, bukiji bukiji ne nabuyuke.

108 
 
Bokwe wisampile bulunda na Mujilo. Lukelo Bokwe waishile kwi mulunda nanji Mujilo. Bokwe 
byo abwela kwanji, Mujilo naye amba, nkeya mu Ntundwe amba, saka mwikala patoka mbai. Abo 
ba Bokwe ne kuya ne mu kiundu ne Bafunda babo. Ne aye Mujilo pa kwiya wibasokele Bafunda 
bonse pelu! Bonka bainabo bo banyemapotu lubilo. Lelo bulunda bwa bokwe ne Mujilo bwapwa. 
Jishimikila ja Kine 
Mutumba wa Kamusongolwa 
Mutumba wa Kamusongolwa ke mutumba utanyiwa mu nkambi ya Kasempa. Uno wayukanyikwa 
bingi na mambo a bulwi bwa kashi bwajinga pakachi ka ba Luyi ne Bakaonde. Ba Kaonde 
bamwesheshe kujimuka ne kukanjila peulu pene ya mutumba wa Kamusongolwa. Pa kuuba, abo 
ba Luyi bajinga munshi ya mutumba. Akyo kibalengejile kupumpulwa kya kine mambo bakaonde 
baalumwinenga mabwe nobe paji kaimana. Kino kyalengejile ba Luyi bamo bajimukile kuyema 
matako mpene lubilo, pa kuuba balaajile pa meso bafwijiletu ponkapa byonka byafwile bena Ijipita 
pa Kalunga Kachila. Kufuma pa kyokya kimye kufika ne buji lelo, bulunda ne bunungwe pakachi 
ka ba Luyi ne ba Kaonde bwatwajijila.

Bafunda  bayuke bintu byubiwa byapusana-pusana mo bafwainwa kwingijisha bulongo ñambilo 
yafyamika 
Bipimo byañingijilo yaketekelwa kubiwa: 
Bafunda  bayuke bulongo bintu byubiwa byapusana-pusana mo bafwainwa kwingijisha bulongo 
ñambilo yafyamika 
Mwingilo wakuuba: 
1. Lumbulula mitundu ya Ñambilo Yazhika. 
2.  Nemba bimwesho bibiji bibiji bya Nkinji ne Ngesakenyo. 
3. Pusanya pakachi ka ñambilo ya nkinji ne ngesakenyo. 
Mepuzho: 
Mufunjishi apituluke mu byo afunjisha bafunda ne kwibasanchila pa kwibikishako kwingila 
mingilo ya kuuba bulongo.
